narrative:
Springboro City 1-B (precinct in Warren County) has 756 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
